Here's my conversation with Don Lincoln about some of the biggest open questions in physics, including dark energy, dark matter, the matter-antimatter imbalance, quantum vacuum, quantum foam, and the quest to unify the laws of physics.

Don is a particle physicist at Fermilab who https://t.co/BNkJ9tKUjy

Here's the links for my conversation with Don Lincoln:

YouTube: https://t.co/sh8V5rWS7D

Spotify: https://t.co/VjTdb68WX7

Podcast: https://t.co/uxqXcfXs8M https://t.co/vPVyVsjT3h

我的原则：
✅ Reasoning Max 
❌Speed Fast

慢就是快，多花点时间推理，你就少花一点时间去验证

快就是贵，Fast 不是不好，主要是性价比不高，不差钱当然无所谓

> 5、在工程组织上，他把 Notion 重构成一个杠铃结构。  一端是非常 junior 的工程师，刚毕业或者职业早期；另一端是少数非常 senior 的架构师和技术带头人。  中间那类常规中高级工程师反而被刻意压缩，整个分布像一根两头重、中间瘦的杠铃。

他这个观点是有问题的：

1. 少了中层衔接

对于 Claude Design 和实际代码的版本同步问题，我目前是这么处理的：

首先要有一个唯一源，就是把 Claude Design 的结果当做设计唯一的源，以它为准

然后在更新design的时候会让它写一个changelog，让 Claude Code 去根据Changelog 同步

尽可能先改 Claude Design https://t.co/DeRBB6uCPN

OpenAI 今天宣布，Codex 的 Computer Use 功能正式登陆 Windows。

这个功能让 AI 能像人一样操作桌面应用，看屏幕、点鼠标、打字，4 月中旬上线时只支持 macOS。

同时更新的还有手机远程控制。5 月中旬 OpenAI 把 Codex 接入了 ChatGPT 手机 App，可以在手机上启动、监控和审批电脑上跑着的 Codex
我就不理解为什么 Codex 在普通模式下一直不支持 ask__user_question tool，有时候回复 Agent 的问题要手动去写就很烦！

有时候反过来也成立的，复杂任务让它们一起做是最优的解法
赛博赛马法

Computer use with Codex is cool.

The animations are cool. It’s fun to watch.

But… is there a possibility that sometime soon the computer/browser use is too fast for us to even watch and comprehend what’s going on?

To understand the future of interacting with AI Agents at scale to operate businesses, it may be useful to study multi-tabling online poker in the 2000s. 

The best poker pros with a significant edge found a way to play multiple tables at once by using a HUD (heads up display) https://t.co/mRzOqUp7TK

Agent mini-apps are the future. 

Bookmark this.

Chrome puppets are about to get buried.

ego lite is what happens when you stop forcing agents into browsers built for humans and give them their own execution layer.

Real login state. Background isolation. Complete browser control.

The toy-agent era is ending.
